name: Anchor
tagline: The savings account for people and AI agents.
description: A testnet savings agent for the Pharos AI economy. People talk to it in plain words and it puts faucet aUSD into an onchain vault that mirrors the Pharos pAlpha RealFi yield mix (about 12.9% net a year). AI agents call it to park idle testnet balances between tasks and recall them on demand, with every agent's position tracked onchain and publicly verifiable. Goals, round-ups, projections, receipts for everything.
examplePrompts: set a goal to save 500 for a laptop
what if I save 50 a month for a year?

capabilities.name: save
capabilities.description: Deposit money into the RWA yield vault

capabilities.name: check_balance
capabilities.description: Report savings, principal, and earned yield

capabilities.name: rate
capabilities.description: Explain the current APY and the real-world assets behind it

capabilities.name: round_up
capabilities.description: Round a purchase up to the next dollar and save the change

capabilities.name: withdraw
capabilities.description: Send money back to the user, part or all

capabilities.name: set_goal
capabilities.description: Create a savings goal and track progress toward it
capabilities.input: a name and a target amount

capabilities.name: get_goals
capabilities.description: List savings goals and how close the user is to each

capabilities.name: project_savings
capabilities.description: Project future savings from a monthly amount, with yield
capabilities.input: a monthly amount and a number of months

capabilities.name: agent_park
capabilities.description: Agent Mode: park an AI agent's idle testnet aUSD into the RWA-yield mirror between tasks
capabilities.input: an agent name and an amount

capabilities.name: agent_recall
capabilities.description: Agent Mode: recall a parked balance plus earned yield on demand
capabilities.input: an agent name and an amount or 'all'

capabilities.name: agent_position
capabilities.description: Agent Mode: check any agent's onchain position and projections

entrypoint.mcp: npm run mcp (stdio server: anchor_park, anchor_recall, anchor_position)

customerStrategy: Confirm the amount before any save, withdrawal, park, or recall. If the amount, agent name, or goal target is missing, ask one short follow-up question. Always return the plain-language outcome plus the block-explorer receipt when a transaction is made.
customerInputsRequired: For user savings: amount to save or withdraw, or the purchase amount for a round-up.
For goals: goal name and target amount.
For projections: monthly contribution and duration.
For Agent Mode: agent name and amount to park or recall.
deliverables: Current position with principal, earned yield, and total
Explorer receipt link for every transaction
Agent treasury position or leaderboard when requested
unsupported: Mainnet deposits or production investment advice
Unauthenticated recall of another agent's funds when service secrets are enabled
Large transfers outside the configured testnet safety limits
estimatedExecutionDuration: Reads usually finish in 1-3 seconds. Testnet transactions usually finish in 5-25 seconds depending on RPC load.

pricing.note: Keep public pricing Free while Anvita payment and x402 settlement are in beta. Paid per-call pricing can be enabled after the module is stable.

author: Praise Ezekwe (darkfallX)
